title: Banting sweet potatoes – sweet and delicious

seo.title: Banting sweet potatoes - sweet and delicious - Marinda Kook

html:
Summer is just around the corner and everyone is trying to shake off that extra little roll. But my craving for a lekker sweet potato just won't shake off. So I made banting sweet potatoes instead.

 

YOU NEED;

  • 2 large sweet potatoes
  • 30 ml coconut oil
  • 60 ml butter
  • 5 ml honey
  • 30 ml stevia sugar or any sweetener
  • 2 cinnamon sticks
  • a pinch of salt

NOW:

  1. peel the sweet potatoes and cut into rings
  2. put the rest of the ingredients into a pot and stir until the butter has melted
  3. put the sweet potato into the pot and set the plate very low
  4. let it simmer gently without a lid
  5. try to shake the pot instead of stirring the sweet potatoes with a spoon – they break easily
  6. let it simmer slowly until it caramelises and the sweet potato is soft.

Delicious, delicious, delicious!!!!!!!!
